description: A comprehensive toolkit for parsing PDF, PNG, JPG, and JPEG documents using LLMs. It identifies document templates dynamically and extracts information based on database configurations.

capabilities.name: dynamic_template_llm_parser
capabilities.description: Dynamically identifies the appropriate parser template from the database based on document content, then extracts information from the specified file or directory according to the matched template.

config.description: Config JSON file path or numeric parser ID

source.description: Full path to the source file or directory for parsing

capabilities.name: llm_parser
capabilities.description: Parses the specified file or directory using a specific pre-defined LLM template parser configuration.

config.description: Config JSON file path or numeric parser ID

source.description: Full path to the source file or directory for parsing

author: HachiAI
